mapper.select: SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE participant_ids = #{participantIds} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE participant_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations WHERE participant_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversations (id, participant_ids, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{participantIds}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
